title: Implement Tickflow merge guard, commit, and merge policy
description: Before accepting worktree output, detect dirty .tick changes and refuse to merge them. Commit only non-.tick paths, run verifiers in the worktree, merge accepted branch into controller branch, clean up on success, and preserve worktree with awaiting escalation notes on conflicts or forbidden .tick mutations.
acceptance_criteria: .tick changes cannot be committed or merged; accepted work is committed and merged; merge conflicts preserve the worktree and set awaiting=escalation with conflict details; cleanup only happens after durable merge and tick update.
